# Helm of the Demon Lord
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Helm%20of%20the%20Demon%20Lord&prop=wikitext

Helm of the Demon Lord is a [https://rotfserver.wikia.com/wiki/Helms Ability for the Warrior] .

"''A Helm of the Demon Lord, Thanks to: pepus''"

'''<u>Stats:</u>'''
* Effect on self: Armored for 2.6 seconds
* Effect on self: Healing for 4 seconds

* On Equip: +8 Vitality +80 Maximum HP
* MP Cost: 110
* Fame Bonus 4%
* Cooldown 5 seconds
It is Dropped by [[Archdemon Malphas]]
